title: Squirrel Removal in Murray Hill, Manhattan | $900 – $2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Murray Hill, Manhattan. Humane extraction, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving Murray Hill's residential & commercial properties. Call today!
intro: Murray Hill's elegant residential buildings and tree-lined streets create an inviting environment for squirrels seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and wall voids. Our professional squirrel removal services protect Murray Hill homes and businesses from the structural damage, noise, and health risks these persistent rodents cause. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective squirrel extraction and exclusion solutions tailored to Manhattan's unique urban wildlife challenges.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Murray Hill property owners for years with humane, effective squirrel removal that addresses both immediate infestations and long-term prevention. Our licensed technicians understand the specific challenges of Murray Hill's pre-war buildings and brownstones, providing customized solutions that protect your property while complying with NYC wildlife regulations.
localContext: Murray Hill's proximity to parks and the mature trees along its quiet residential blocks make it particularly attractive to Eastern Gray Squirrels seeking nesting sites. The neighborhood's mix of historic brownstones, high-rise apartments, and commercial buildings near Grand Central requires specialized removal techniques that account for varied building structures and co-op regulations.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Murray Hill?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Murray Hill typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, accessibility, and necessary repairs. A single-entry point situation in an accessible area will be on the lower end, while multiple squirrels, extensive damage, or difficult-to-reach areas like tall building rooflines increase costs. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning work.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in Murray Hill buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels are quite common in Murray Hill due to the neighborhood's tree-lined streets, proximity to parks, and mix of older buildings with accessible entry points. Pre-war buildings, brownstones, and even newer high-rises can experience squirrel intrusions through roof vents, chimneys, damaged soffits, and construction gaps. Fall and spring are peak seasons when squirrels seek warm nesting sites.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Murray Hill property?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Murray Hill service calls within 24 hours for inspections. The removal timeline depends on the situation, but most cases are resolved within 3-7 days. We use humane one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to leave but not return, followed by permanent sealing of entry points. Emergency same-day service is available for urgent situations involving significant property damage or squirrels in living spaces.

faqs.question: Will squirrels return after removal in Murray Hill?
faqs.answer: When properly excluded, squirrels will not return to the same entry points. Our comprehensive service includes identifying and sealing all potential entry points, installing protective barriers, and providing warranties on our exclusion work. We use durable materials designed for NYC buildings and offer follow-up inspections to ensure long-term protection. Squirrels have excellent memory and may attempt re-entry, which is why thorough exclusion is critical.
